cores.name: scar-for-a-scar-1---Scar for a Scar
cores.textbox: When this is played, if you have less {h} than an opposing hero, it gets **go again**.

faces.printed_rules_text: When you play Scar for a Scar, if you have less {h} than your opponent, it gains **go again**.
rules_text_html: When you play Scar for a Scar, if you have less than your opponent, it gains go again.

faces.printed_rules_text: When you play Scar for a Scar, if you have less {h} than an opposing hero, it gains **go again**.
rules_text_html: When you play Scar for a Scar, if you have less than an opposing hero, it gains go again.

faces.printed_rules_text: When you play Scar for a Scar, if you have less {h} than your opponent, it gains **go again**.
rules_text_html: When you play Scar for a Scar, if you have less than your opponent, it gains go again.

faces.printed_rules_text: When you play Scar for a Scar, if you have less {h} than your opponent, it gains **go again**.
rules_text_html: When you play Scar for a Scar, if you have less than your opponent, it gains go again.

faces.printed_rules_text: When you play Scar for a Scar, if you have less {h} than your opponent, it gains **go again**.
rules_text_html: When you play Scar for a Scar, if you have less than your opponent, it gains go again.

faces.printed_rules_text: When you play Scar for a Scar, if you have less {h} than your opponent, it gains **go again**.
rules_text_html: When you play Scar for a Scar, if you have less than your opponent, it gains go again.

faces.printed_rules_text: When you play Scar for a Scar, if you have less {g} than your opponent, it gains **go again**.
rules_text_html: When you play Scar for a Scar, if you have less than your opponent, it gains go again.

faces.printed_rules_text: When you play Scar for a Scar, if you have less {h} than your opponent, it gains **go again**.
rules_text_html: When you play Scar for a Scar, if you have less than your opponent, it gains go again.

faces.printed_rules_text: Wenn du Narbe um Narbe spielst und weniger {h} als ein gegnerischer Held hast, erhält die Karte **Go again**.
rules_text_html: Wenn du Narbe um Narbe spielst und weniger als ein gegnerischer Held hast, erhält die Karte Go again.

faces.printed_rules_text: Lorsque vous jouez Sang pour Sang, si vous avez moins de {h} que votre adversaire, elle gagne **go again**.
rules_text_html: Lorsque vous jouez Sang pour Sang, si vous avez moins de que votre adversaire, elle gagne go again.

faces.printed_rules_text: Cuando juegues Cicatriz por cicatriz, si tienes menos {h} que un héroe oponente, este gana **continuar**.
rules_text_html: Cuando juegues Cicatriz por cicatriz, si tienes menos que un héroe oponente, este gana continuar.

faces.printed_rules_text: Quando giochi Cicatrice per Cicatrice, se hai meno {h} del tuo avversario, la carta guadagna **continua**.
rules_text_html: Quando giochi Cicatrice per Cicatrice, se hai meno del tuo avversario, la carta guadagna continua.

faces.printed_rules_text: When you play Scar for a Scar, if you have less {g} than an opposing hero, it gains **go again**.
rules_text_html: When you play Scar for a Scar, if you have less than an opposing hero, it gains go again.

faces.printed_rules_text: Wenn du Narbe um Narbe spielst und falls du weniger {g} hast als ein gegnerischer Held, erhält es **Weitermachen**.
rules_text_html: Wenn du Narbe um Narbe spielst und falls du weniger hast als ein gegnerischer Held, erhält es Weitermachen.

faces.printed_rules_text: Quand vous jouez Sang pour sang, si vous avez moins de {g} qu’un héros adverse, il gagne **encore une fois**.
rules_text_html: Quand vous jouez Sang pour sang, si vous avez moins de qu’un héros adverse, il gagne encore une fois.

faces.printed_rules_text: Cuando juegues Cicatriz por cicatriz, si tienes menos {g} que un héroe oponente, gana **continuar**.
rules_text_html: Cuando juegues Cicatriz por cicatriz, si tienes menos que un héroe oponente, gana continuar.

faces.printed_rules_text: Quando giochi Cicatrice per Cicatrice, se hai meno {g} di un eroe avversario, guadagna **Continua**.
rules_text_html: Quando giochi Cicatrice per Cicatrice, se hai meno di un eroe avversario, guadagna Continua.

faces.printed_rules_text: Wenn du Narbe um Narbe spielst und weniger {g} als ein gegnerischer Held hast, erhält die Karte **Go again**.
rules_text_html: Wenn du Narbe um Narbe spielst und weniger als ein gegnerischer Held hast, erhält die Karte Go again.

faces.printed_rules_text: Lorsque vous jouez Sang pour Sang, si vous avez moins de {g} que votre adversaire, elle gagne **go again**.
rules_text_html: Lorsque vous jouez Sang pour Sang, si vous avez moins de que votre adversaire, elle gagne go again.

faces.printed_rules_text: Cuando juegues Cicatriz por cicatriz, si tienes menos {g} que un héroe oponente, este gana **continuar**.
rules_text_html: Cuando juegues Cicatriz por cicatriz, si tienes menos que un héroe oponente, este gana continuar.

faces.printed_rules_text: Quando giochi Cicatrice per Cicatrice, se hai meno {g} del tuo avversario, la carta guadagna **continua**.
rules_text_html: Quando giochi Cicatrice per Cicatrice, se hai meno del tuo avversario, la carta guadagna continua.

faces.printed_rules_text: When you play Scar for a Scar, if you have less {h} than your opponent, it gains **go again**.
rules_text_html: When you play Scar for a Scar, if you have less than your opponent, it gains go again.

faces.printed_rules_text: When you play Scar for a Scar, if you have less {g} than an opposing hero, it gains **go again**.

faces.printed_rules_text: ｢傷には傷を｣をプレイしたとき、あなたが対戦相手のヒーロー１人より少ない{g}を持つ場合、これは**続行**を得る。
